creator: msaddkijalel@gmail.com
text:
Please, instead of static libraries, let it create dynamic ones. The use of dynamic libraries is strongly recommended.

It's not possible to construct in poudriere. Before submitting, please build any ports in poudriere. [1] x11 cannot be found by Poudriere, but stage-qa makes no mention of it. Trilinos may have a problem if this is true, since their CMakeLists.txt calls for it but never uses it. When upstream bugs are discovered, they must be reported.

see more here https://www.healthimhere.com/44175-pill-acetaminophen-500-mg-uses-side-effects-reviews.html
